findings.action: Next: Confirm whether updates are OTA, app-driven, local-only, or unavailable in the field. Clarify with: OTA firmware updates, USB-only local update, +1 more
findings.finding: Confirm whether firmware or software updates are supported, and whether they are OTA, app-driven, local-only, or unavailable. Affects: CRA, RED-DA.

findings.action: Next: Confirm cloud dependency, account requirement, and whether core functions still work without cloud access. Clarify with: cloud account required, local LAN control without cloud dependency, +1 more
findings.finding: Confirm whether the smart features require cloud dependency or can operate locally. Affects: RED-DA, CRA, GDPR.

findings.action: Next: Confirm personal / health data categories, storage locations, retention, and cloud transfer scope. Clarify with: heart rate and activity data in app account, cloud video history, +1 more
findings.finding: Confirm which personal or health-related data categories are processed and whether they are stored locally, in the app, in the cloud, or not retained. Affects: GDPR, CRA, RED-DA.

findings.action: Collect: data-flow review, privacy documentation review Check: privacy, software
findings.finding: GDPR review stays review-dependent before it can be relied on. additional traits matched: account, data_storage, microphone, personal_data_likely. Review whether product features, services, or accounts involve personal-data processing that triggers GDPR obligations.

findings.action: Collect: cybersecurity assessment, personal data and privacy protection description, technical documentation mapping Check: cybersecurity, software
findings.finding: EN 18031-2 stays review-dependent before it can be relied on. required traits matched: radio. additional traits matched: personal_data_likely. some routing traits are inferred from product context and still need confirmation. RED Article 3.3(e) route. Applies to internet-connected radio equipment, childcare devices, toys, and wearables that process personal data, traffic data, or location data.. requires confirmed evidence before the route can be treated as fully selected

findings.action: Prepare: EU Declaration of Conformity, EMC assessment, test reports, +1 more
findings.finding: EMC Directive is part of the current compliance route. Likely applicable where the product can generate or be affected by electromagnetic disturbance.

findings.action: Prepare: EU Declaration of Conformity, technical documentation, risk assessment, +1 more
findings.finding: Low Voltage Directive is part of the current compliance route. Likely applicable to mains-powered electrical equipment within the Low Voltage Directive voltage scope.

findings.action: Prepare: SVHC review, Article 33 communication, substance compliance records
findings.finding: REACH Regulation is part of the current compliance route. Article-level REACH obligations should be checked for products placed on the EU market.

findings.action: Prepare: EU Declaration of Conformity, radio test evidence, EMC under RED, +1 more
findings.finding: Radio Equipment Directive is part of the current compliance route. Applicable where the product includes intentional radio transmission or reception.

findings.action: Prepare: EU Declaration of Conformity, cybersecurity evidence, EN 18031 part mapping, +1 more Confirm: internet-connected radio equipment, radio equipment with OTA, cloud, or other networked software functions, +2 more
findings.finding: RED DA Cybersecurity is part of the current compliance route. Review under the RED delegated cybersecurity regime where radio equipment is internet-connected, app-connected, uses networked software features, requires account or authentication controls, or supports monetary transactions.

findings.action: Prepare: EU Declaration of Conformity, material declarations, IEC 63000 technical documentation
findings.finding: RoHS Directive is part of the current compliance route. Generally applicable to electrical and electronic equipment unless a specific exclusion applies.

findings.action: Next: Confirm radio bands, channel families, and declared output power / EIRP. Clarify with: Bluetooth LE 2.4 GHz, Wi-Fi 2.4/5 GHz, +1 more
findings.finding: Confirm the radio bands and declared output power. Affects: RED, RED-DA.

findings.action: Collect: test report, technical construction file Check: emission
findings.finding: EN 55032 selected as a harmonized standard route. required traits matched: electronic. additional traits matched: av_ict, data_storage, microphone, speaker. EMC emission route for AV/ICT-style multimedia equipment. Do not use as the primary appliance EMC route for household appliances.

findings.action: Collect: technical construction file, test report Check: emission
findings.finding: EN 61000-3-2 selected as a harmonized standard route. required traits matched: electrical. additional traits matched: mains_power_likely. Typically considered for mains-powered equipment depending on product characteristics and scope. harmonics Keep under EMC listing / other EMC standards.

suggested_questions: Confirm the radio bands and declared output power.
Confirm whether the smart features require cloud dependency or can operate locally.
Confirm which personal or health-related data categories are processed and whether they are stored locally, in the app, in the cloud, or not retained.
Confirm whether firmware or software updates are supported, and whether they are OTA, app-driven, local-only, or unavailable.
Confirm whether the smart features require an account, pairing flow, local-only control, or permanent cloud access.

suggested_quick_adds.label: cloud dependency

suggested_quick_adds.label: data storage scope
suggested_quick_adds.text: heart rate and activity data in app account

summary: 14 standard routes identified. 4 review-dependent routes identified. primary legislation: LVD, EMC, RED, RED-DA, RoHS, REACH, GPSR, WEEE, Ecodesign, CRA, GDPR. RED cybersecurity gating is active because connected radio functionality was detected.
top_actions: Confirm radio bands, channel families, and declared output power / EIRP.
Confirm cloud dependency, account requirement, and whether core functions still work without cloud access.
Confirm personal / health data categories, storage locations, retention, and cloud transfer scope.
